$comment: Model routing for pi-workflow subagents. Keys are roles; each role maps to the agent pi-workflow.pw-<role>. Applied to subagents.agentOverrides by scripts/apply-models.mjs. Every ID must exist in `pi --list-models`; skills fall back to the session model and warn if one is missing.

scout.why: Cheapest fast model. Codebase mapping and tool probing are recall tasks, not reasoning tasks.

researcher.why: Strong synthesis across many fetched pages, a tier below the planner in cost.

planner.why: 1M context holds the interview, the research and the whole plan at once.

worker.why: Code-specialised with 262K max output, enough for large multi-file work packages.

reviewer.why: Deliberately a different family from worker so review is a genuine second opinion. Never set this to the worker model.

scribe.why: Tool docs and summaries do not need a frontier model.

oracle.why: Escalation path when a worker and reviewer disagree twice. Maps to the pi-subagents builtin `oracle`, not a pw- agent.
